mainEntity.name: Which entity type is best for my business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pvt Ltd for funding, LLP for professionals, OPC for solo entrepreneurs, Section 8 for non-profit. We advise based on your specific goals.

mainEntity.name: What is the cheapest company to register?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sole proprietorship (₹0 registration fee) or LLP (from ₹5,999). Pvt Ltd from ₹8,999 all-inclusive.

mainEntity.name: Can NRIs register a company in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. NRIs can be directors and shareholders. At least one director must be an Indian resident (182+ days in India).

mainEntity.name: Do you provide company registration services in Andaman and Nicobar Islands?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Andaman and Nicobar Islands from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Andaman and Nicobar Islands?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Andaman and Nicobar Islands fall under ROC Chennai. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Andaman and Nicobar Islands-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Andaman and Nicobar Islands?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Andaman and Nicobar Islands: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
